CustomField.formula: IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Homes_suitable_for_KPI1_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Homes_suitable_for_KPI1_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Homes_suitable_for_KPI2_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Homes_suitable_for_KPI2_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( PR_matches_previous_baseline_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Matches_previous_baseline_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Carry_over_any_deviation_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Carry_over_any_deviation_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Accompanying_PCR_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Accompanying_PCR_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Compliant_wave_3_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Compliant_wave_3_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Key_project_roles_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Key_project_roles_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Comply_with_A_A_policy_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Comply_with_A_A_policy_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Received_signed_copy_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Received_signed_copy_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Updated_PP_RR_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Updated_PP_RR_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Phase_DCA_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL(Phase_DCA_High_Risk__c, "No")), 1, 0)
CustomField.label: Declarations - Total Normal Red
